title: Get Your First Bank Account
description: Open a fee-free bank account, set up direct deposit, and start a $20/week savings habit. The foundation of everything.

steps.title: Get your ID together
steps.what: You'll need a government photo ID, your Social Security card or number, and proof of address.
steps.why: Banks legally have to verify who you are. No exceptions.
steps.action: Take photos of your ID and SS card. We'll store them safely.
steps.ai_check: Have you got your ID and SSN ready?

steps.title: Pick a bank that doesn't charge fees
steps.what: Most banks charge $5-15/month. You want a fee-free one.
steps.action: Open Chime, Current, or Capital One 360. We'll open the link.

steps.title: Set up direct deposit
steps.what: Get paid 2 days early and avoid check-cashing fees (those are scams).
steps.why: Check cashing places take 3-5% of your paycheck. Direct deposit is free.
steps.action: Give your employer your routing + account numbers from the app.

steps.title: Turn on overdraft protection
steps.what: Stop the bank from charging you $35 every time your card declines.
steps.why: One bad week = $200 in overdraft fees. Don't.
steps.action: Open the bank app, go to Settings, turn off overdraft.

steps.title: Start the $20/week habit
steps.what: Set up an auto-transfer of $20/week to savings. That's $1,040/year without thinking.
steps.why: This is the foundation of everything. A $1k emergency fund changes your life.
steps.action: Open the app, go to Recurring Transfer, set $20/week.
